title: PvP Focus
description: PvP focussing resource pack. This pack helps you to focus your PvP. Except for PvP items like swords and swords, everything is black and white. This allows you to see your target from afar. Everything is simple, while special items are clearly visible.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/918e9276714b8c4d20faeaf842748f353fb13fe8.png)
  
# ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Äé ‚Äé  ‚Äé ‚Äé  ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé  ‚Äé  ‚Äé This resource pack helps you to focus pvp.
  
The entire game world is turned into black and white tones, while armor, weapons, and other important PvP items remain in bright, eye-catching colors. This makes it easier to spot enemies from a distance and stay focused without distractions. Clean, simple, and competitive. 
### We recommend using this pack while playing the NethPot kit.

# Requirements
![Requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc857075ad74154e659c30a0b08b4f9b95958100.png)
# You should download [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod.
